37.reason: [This resets k to 0 but does not null-terminate s or process the word collected so far. Words are only processed after non-letter characters, but resetting k here without processing leads to lost words. Also, hyphen '-' is incorrectly treated as part of a word, violating the problem's definition that words consist only of letters.]
